answer: To reset your password, open Settings, choose Account, then select Reset Password. Check your email for the reset link.
For billing issues, share the invoice or charge details in a support ticket and our team will review it.
Refunds are usually processed within 5 to 7 business days to the original payment method.
If you cannot log in, clear your browser cache, check Caps Lock, and try resetting your password.
To update account details, go to Settings, choose Profile, and select Edit.
To cancel a subscription, open Settings, choose Billing, then select Cancel Plan.
